values: Being slow causes you to struggle to keep pace with the team
Not being fit causes you to miss out on the deep, transformative experience Indiahikes designs

evidence.quote_or_summary: You struggle to be a part of the team because you’re slow.
You miss out on a deep, transformative experience that Indiahikes specially designs for you.

values: Walk, jog, or run 10 km in under 60 minutes (minimum recommended fitness level)
Trekking primarily uses lungs, core, calves, glutes, quads, and hamstrings
Cardiovascular endurance and muscle strength are the two things to work on

evidence.quote_or_summary: To do the Bali Pass Trek comfortably, you must be able to walk, jog or run 10 km in under 60 minutes. This is the minimum recommended fitness level that you must aim for.
Trekking is a sport that primarily uses your lungs, core, calves, glutes, quads and hamstrings.
To reach any fitness target, there are two things you must work on: Cardiovascular endurance; Muscle strength

values: Every trekker needs fitness approval from the Indiahikes team 20 days before the trek date; without it you will not be allowed on the trek
Only running, jogging, or walking are accepted as fitness proofs; cross-training workouts will not be considered valid
Record at least 3 runs from the last 1 month that meet the trek's fitness criteria
Upload via Strava, Nike Run Club, or similar app; paste the public profile link on your Indiahikes account
Fitness profile must be linked and public; failure to link or to meet the required level at least three times in the past month may lead to rejection

evidence.quote_or_summary: Every trekker needs fitness approval from the Indiahikes team 20 days before the trek date. Without this, you will not be allowed on the trek.
We accept only running, jogging or walking as fitness proofs. Cross-training workouts will not be considered valid.
So make sure to record at least 3 runs from the last 1 month to meet the fitness criteria of the trek.

Use fitness tracking apps such as Strava, Nike Run Club, or similar to log your runs and workouts. Paste your profile's link on your Indiahikes account (your profile has to be public). Ensure that at least 3 runs from the last 1 month meet the fitness criteria of your specific trek.
If you fail to link your fitness profile; If you do not meet the required fitness level at least three times in the past month

values: 6-week plan provided for those not currently active
General recommendation to start the fitness routine 6 to 8 weeks before the trek begins

evidence.quote_or_summary: If you are not currently active, follow the below schedule to get trek fit in 6 weeks!
All you need to do is start following the fitness routine 6 to 8 weeks before your trek begins.

values: Children below 14 years are not required to submit fitness records; parents must ensure children remain physically active and prepared

evidence.quote_or_summary: Children below 14 years are not required to submit fitness records. However, parents must ensure that children remain physically active and prepared for the trek.
